# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command_1:
        description: 'First build command'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "Running first command"'
      build_command_2:
        description: 'Second build command'
        required: true
        default: 'echo "Running second command"'

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Execute first build command
      run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command_1 }}
      shell: bash

    - name: Execute second build command
      run: ${{ github.event.inputs.build_command_2 }}
      shell: bash
